CustomField.description: This field displays the underlying rates and the related details for this MR Rate Schedule period. Automatically updated when rates are added, modified, or removed. Use this field for a quick reference to view rates without navigating to child records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays the underlying rates and the related details for this MR Rate Schedule period. Automatically updated when rates are added, modified, or removed. Use this field for a quick reference to view rates without navigating to child records.
CustomField.label: Rate Details Overview
